commit.message:
Replace getters and setters with Lombok annotations

- SeenUrl: replace 5 getters and no-arg constructor with @Getter and @NoArgsConstructor
- FilterConfig: replace 4 getter/setter pairs with @Getter and @Setter

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Rename package com.webcrawler to org.webcrawler and replace wildcard imports

Replace all wildcard imports (.*) with explicit single-class imports across
6 files and rename the base package from com.webcrawler to org.webcrawler
in all 42 Java source files, build.gradle, and directory structure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Move model selector below Cloud radio, fix layout visibility

- Model selector (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) now appears directly below the
  Cloud radio button and is hidden when API mode is active
- Switch visibility control from BView::Hide/Show to
  BLayoutItem::SetVisible, which correctly handles both layout
  reflow and repainting on Haiku
- Track mode with fIsApiMode bool to avoid relying on radio button
  values across separate parent groups
- Update README to document new model selector placement and
  persistence behaviour

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
refactor: rename survey-level axes (core→foundation, diff→progress+gap)

Clearer mapping from paper-level annotations to survey-level synthesis:
- core assumptions → foundation (shared technical building blocks)
- diff → progress (trajectory of advances) + gap (structural unsolved problems)

commit.message:
Fix Bortoleto driver ID mapping (bortoleto → bortoletto)

API uses 'bortoleto' (single t) but our data key is 'bortoletto'
(double t). The DRIVER_MAP key had the wrong spelling so the mapping
was never applied, causing 0 points for Bortoleto.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: button link variant excess horizontal whitespace (#309)

commit.message:
feat: add dual-sided referral system with tap-to-claim rewards

Referral program where both referrer and referee earn €1 + 3 spins.
Referral completes when referee scans a receipt over €50. Rewards
are claimed independently via POST /referral/claim. Claimed referral
bonuses appear in cashback summary alongside receipt rewards.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix profile page error: gracefully degrade when Supabase query fails

Instead of showing an error toast when the profile query fails (e.g. no
active session or RLS blocks), fall back to a local profile object built
from user metadata so the page renders with empty editable fields.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: lifelink-sync
repository.description: LifeLink Sync – Emergency Protection Platform for Families

commit.message:
fix: source rename runs every load (no flag), handles spacing variations around slash

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: live-window weather depth, atmosphere colors, and visual polish (#43)

* fix: refresh location data on IP change instead of using stale cache

Previously, fetchLocation was rate-limited to 30 minutes, so switching
VPNs and refreshing the page would show cached location/weather data
from the old IP. Now fetchLocation always calls the API (it's only
invoked once per page load + hourly polling), and weather is force-
refreshed when the location coordinates change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: add idle blinds design

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: add idle blinds implementation plan

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: dispatch chat:idle and chat:active events on document

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add openBlinds/closeBlinds to BlindsComponent, remove auto-open on update

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: wire chat idle/active events to LiveWindow blinds

- Expose openBlinds/closeBlinds on LiveWindowElement
- Call openBlinds() on initial load in startUpdates()
- Listen for chat:idle/chat:active on homepage to close/open blinds

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: reset blinds state on destroy, void dropped promise in closeBlinds

Ensures Astro page transitions re-animate blinds on re-mount.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: extract global idle manager from chat to site-wide

- Move createIdleManager to app/src/scripts/idle-manager.ts
- Create global instance in BaseLayout.ts with document-level activity
  detection (mousemove, keydown, touchstart on entire page)
- Dispatch site:idle / site:active events instead of chat:idle / chat:active
- Chat now listens for site events instead of owning idle detection
- Any page interaction resets idle, not just chat panel activity

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: trigger idle on user inactivity, not just tab visibility

The idle manager now starts an inactivity timer on creation and resets
it on every user interaction, so blinds close and chat disconnects
after 5 minutes of no activity even when the tab stays visible.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: clear current user's status dot on idle disconnect

When the user goes idle and the WebSocket closes, their own status dots
next to chat messages were staying green because the client never
received the server's STATUS broadcast after disconnecting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: hide moon when sun visible, smooth sky transitions, prevent celestial flash on load

- Hide moon when sun is above the horizon to avoid both being visible at sunset
- Increase sky update interval from 15min to 10s for imperceptible gradient changes
- Defer blinds opening and celestial rendering until weather data arrives (API windows)
  to prevent sun/moon flashing at wrong position then jumping

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: unified precipitation system with intensity-based particle density

Replace the old grid-based droplet layout and diagonal animation with a
unified scattered-particle renderer. All precipitation now falls straight
down using a configurable PrecipConfig table (count, fallSpeed, shape,
sway, color, opacity). Snow sways most, sleet sways slightly, rain has
no sway. Particle count scales with OWM description intensity (light
0.6x, heavy 1.4x, extreme 1.8x). Sleet particles are blue-tinted to
denote rain/snow mix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: add live-window playground design

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: add live-window playground implementation plan

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: move live-window-test page to /dev/ directory

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add override attributes and virtual clock logic to live-window

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test: add override attribute tests for live-window

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: create live-window playground with all controls

Adds dev-only interactive playground page at /dev/live-window-playground
with controls for time, tick speed, weather, sun/moon, and display settings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: lower sun/moon arc to sit below window blinds

Adjusted celestial arc from (base=70, amplitude=60) to (base=85,
amplitude=42) so the sun and moon appear lower in the window at all
times of day. Noon now sits at ~43% and sunset/sunrise at ~85%.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: correct celestial test threshold and playground clear sky override

Update zenith y-threshold to match current arc parameters (base=85,
amplitude=42). Fix playground "None (clear sky)" to set override-weather
to "01d" instead of removing the attribute, which was falling back to
real API data (showing clouds).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: add sleet option and use sticky window in playground

Add missing sleet weather condition to the playground dropdown
(uses snow icon 13 with sleet description). Replace the independent
scrollbar on controls with normal page scroll and a sticky window.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: remove theme, weather text, and temp unit controls from playground

These display controls aren't useful in the playground: temp unit is
location-dependent, weather text toggle is unnecessary, and there's no
light theme to toggle to.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: add weather ID system design for live-window refactor

Defines the approach for switching from icon-based to weather condition
ID-based visual effects, covering all 50+ OpenWeatherMap condition codes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: add weather ID system implementation plan

8-task TDD plan covering API, types, WeatherLayer rewrite, CSS renames,
and playground updates for the weather condition ID refactor.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(api): add weather condition id to API response

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add weather id to frontend types, remove overrideWeatherDescription

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: switch override-weather to numeric IDs, remove override-weather-description

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add new precipitation types and atmosphere configs

Add 6 new precipitation configs (drizzle, showerRain, freezingRain,
lightSnow, heavySnow, showerSnow) and a new ATMOSPHERE_CONFIG export
with 9 atmosphere types (mist, fog, smoke, haze, dust, dustWhirls,
volcanicAsh, squalls, tornado) for the weather ID refactor.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: replace icon-based weather mapping with weather ID effects system

Replace ICON_WEATHER_MAP and intensityMultiplier with WEATHER_EFFECTS map
keyed by OpenWeatherMap condition IDs. Each ID maps to a WeatherEffectConfig
specifying clouds, precipitation layers, lightning, atmosphere, and snow
accumulation. Rewrite WeatherLayer.update() to use the new config-driven
rendering with support for multiple precipitation layers, atmosphere effects,
and granular per-ID control.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: rename mist CSS to atmosphere-layer, use dynamic inline styles

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: update playground with grouped weather ID dropdown, remove intensity select

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: remove dead thunderstorm precip config, restore atmosphere box-shadow glow

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: remove atmosphere box-shadow, keep flat style

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: procedural cloud generation, storm density, and dynamic sky darkening

Replace hardcoded 3-cloud system with procedural generation using curated
cloud shape presets (body + extensions). Add "storm" cloud density for
thunderstorms (9 clouds vs 6 for heavy). Add dynamic sky-darken overlay
computed from cloud density, precipitation, and lightning. Improve
thunderstorm cloud color to blue-gray rgb(50, 55, 72).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add playground live mode, moon phase override, and dynamic moon glow

Rework playground with Live/Override time modes, location presets with
timezone support, and moon phase slider with presets. Moon glow now
scales with illumination phase (dim at new moon, bright at full moon),
and moon shadow color samples the sky gradient at the moon's position.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: playground UI polish — standardize inputs, reorder sections, fix cloud placement

Rename weather "None (Live Weather)" to "Live", put all label+select pairs
inline with gap, reorder sections (Weather > Time > Sun/Moon > Tick Speed),
and use independent hash for cloud Y-coordinates to eliminate diagonal pattern.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: dynamic cloud colors by time-of-day and density, fix weather label alignment

Cloud colors now vary across 6 combinations (day/night × light/heavy/storm density)
instead of a single thunderstorm override. Weather label text is centered and uses
nowrap to keep the full description on one line.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: precipitation visuals, remove snow accumulation, smooth cloud colors

- Freezing rain: faster, more elongated drops with icy-blue color to
  distinguish from snow
- Remove snow accumulation feature (snow-sill/mounds) entirely
- Ragged thunderstorm (221) and ragged shower rain (531) now have
  sparse, scattered precipitation matching their meteorological meaning
- Fix precipitation animation stutter with translate3d and will-change
- Cloud colors now smoothly interpolate by sun altitude (smoothstep)
  instead of binary day/night toggle via icon
- Clouds pick up sky gradient colors near the horizon (sunrise/sunset)
  with density-based tint strength
- Remove weather icon dependency from WeatherLayer

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: bump live window localStorage cache version

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(weather): add new types, configs, and update all 50 weather code effects

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(weather): add atmosphere particle, wind, and lightning rendering

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test(weather): update tests for new weather effects (wind, atmo particles, lightning variants)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Covers 6 fixes: tornado rain reduction, differentiated atmosphere
particles, atmosphere layer positioning, animation stutter prevention,
tilted rain loop fix, and cloud distribution bias.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: add weather visual fixes implementation plan

10-task plan covering tornado rain, atmosphere particles, atmosphere
layer, cloud distribution, tilted rain loop, and re-render caching.

* feat(weather): reduce tornado rain from extreme to heavy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(weather): add aspectRatio/blur/borderRadius to AtmosphereParticleConfig, differentiate mist/fog/smoke

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(weather): render atmosphere particles with per-config blur/aspect-ratio, add atmo-rise keyframe

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(weather): atmosphere layer covers full width, uses subtle pulse instead of horizontal roll

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(weather): use golden-ratio spacing for even cloud distribution

* fix(weather): use skewX for wind-tilted rain to prevent loop stutter

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(weather): add depth layering, time-of-day atmosphere colors, and overcast fix

- Split clouds into back/front layers with lightning and precipitation
  rendered between them for realistic depth
- Add day/night color pairs to all atmosphere and particle configs,
  interpolated by sun altitude with sunset tinting via CSS variables
- Change overcast (804) from storm to heavy density so daytime clouds
  are properly light gray instead of dark purple
- Fix smoke particle animation to fade in/out smoothly instead of popping

* feat(blinds): randomize skew direction, amount, and open height on each open

* refactor(live-window): deduplicate utils, split WeatherLayer, standardize naming

Extract shared math utilities (clamp01, lerp, smoothstep, knuthHash) into
utils/math.ts. Consolidate color interpolation (rgbToHex, lerpColor, lerpHex)
into utils/color.ts, removing duplicates from MoonLayer, WeatherLayer, and
sky-gradient. Extract findPhasePosition to eliminate copy-pasted phase lookup
logic. Split 888-line WeatherLayer into weather/ submodules (types, configs,
colors, html). Rename blendGradient → lerpGradient for consistent naming.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(live-window): replace magic numbers with named constants

Extract inline numeric literals into named constants across the
live-window codebase for readability and maintainability. Shared time
constants live in a new utils/constants.ts; file-local constants are
defined at the top of each file. Moon diameter is now set via CSS
custom property from JS as a single source of truth.

commit.message:
feat: client portal with tabs, AI document generation, bidirectional docs

- Transform /cita/[token] into full client portal with tabs:
  Cita | Mis Documentos | Docs del Consultor | Formularios SIJ
- Progress bar showing completion status across all sections
- Integrate Gemini AI (gemini-3.1-pro) for SIJ affidavit generation
  using Henry's master prompt for legal document creation
- Bidirectional document flow: Henry uploads → client downloads
- Admin case view: new "Documentos para el Cliente" section
- New API routes: /api/ai/generate-sij-document,
  /api/admin/client-documents, /api/client-documents/download
- Migration 017: case_form_submissions table + documents.direction column
- SIJ form pre-fills client data from DB (name, DOB, country, parents)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix ZIPScribble map not rendering on initial load

Replace window.onresize + $effect with ResizeObserver, which fires
when the SVG element is first laid out. Also switch from baseVal
(returns 0 for percentage-sized SVGs before layout) to
getBoundingClientRect() for reliable pixel dimensions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: redirect endpoint with lineage (Phase 2 Unit 6) (#46)

* feat: redirect endpoint with lineage (Phase 2 Unit 6)

POST /workflows/{wf}/tasks/{task}/redirect — compound operation that
transitions a RUNNING or PAUSED task to REDIRECTED status and creates
a new task with entirely new input. Lineage tracking uses the same
parent_task_id/root_task_id/retask_depth columns as retask.

Includes 33 tests covering happy paths, auth, state validation, 404s,
lineage chains, inherit_progress, priority handling, HATEOAS links,
event creation, request validation, and RFC field names.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address PR #46 review — 3 blockers resolved

Blocker 1 — No depth limit on redirect: Added lineage depth check
to redirect_task() matching retask_task() pattern. Raises
RETASK_DEPTH_EXCEEDED (422) when lineage_depth >= fleet_lineage_max_depth.
Added test_depth_limit_exceeded to redirect test suite.

Blocker 2 — Column name semantically wrong: Renamed retask_depth to
lineage_depth across the entire codebase (model, service, routes, config,
tests). The column is used by both retask and redirect operations, so
"retask_depth" was misleading. Config renamed fleet_retask_max_depth to
fleet_lineage_max_depth. Alembic migration 005 handles the DB rename.

Blocker 3 — RFC link deviation undocumented: Added comment in redirect
endpoint noting RFC §3.15 shows bare string links, implementation uses
HATEOAS object form per Agentic API Standard §2 (matching retask pattern).

667 tests pass, ruff clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
docs(agent): add attachment modifier section with intent augmentation examples

Attachments are a context modifier, not a standalone intent. Documents how
the framework routes different file types: text/code files are read and
injected as L4 context (local routing preserved), while images and PDFs
force escalation to Claude regardless of intent since the local LLM cannot
process binary files. Includes four worked examples (log+debug, diagram+review,
PDF spec+implement, CSV+research) and specifies size limits with overflow behaviour.

Fix Railway deploy: allow prerender.py through .dockerignore

The prerender Docker stage copies scripts/prerender.py, but .dockerignore
excluded the entire scripts/ directory. Use scripts/* instead of scripts
so the negation pattern !scripts/prerender.py can re-include the file.

This caused all 10 deployments since March 6th to fail.

commit.message:
Fix: bypass Next.js body limit via direct Supabase Storage upload (#85)

All Next.js App Router body reading methods (formData, arrayBuffer, etc.)
share the same internal HTTP body buffer cap, making it impossible to
receive large PDFs through a route handler regardless of parsing approach.

New architecture:
- GET /api/rag/upload-url: returns a signed Supabase Storage upload URL
- Browser PUTs the PDF directly to Supabase Storage (no Next.js involved)
- POST /api/rag/ingest now accepts JSON { storagePath } and downloads the
  file server-side via admin client, then cleans up the temp file

Closes #84

Co-authored-by: Lamisi Gurah <lamisi.gurah@dnb.no>

commit.message:
fix(api): bundle RDS CA certificate for SSL database connections (#151)

## Summary
- Bundle the AWS RDS global CA certificate (`rds-global-bundle.pem`)
with the Lambda deployment
- Update `connection.ts` to pass the CA cert via `ssl.ca` when
`DB_SSL=true`
- Update the bundle script to copy the PEM alongside `index.mjs`
- Update the deploy workflow to include the PEM in the Lambda zip

## Root Cause
The Lambda was connecting to RDS with `ssl: { rejectUnauthorized: true
}` but without providing the RDS CA certificate. Node.js on Lambda
doesn't trust the Amazon RDS CA by default, causing every DB query to
fail with: `self-signed certificate in certificate chain`

## Test plan
- [ ] All 220 existing tests pass (3 pre-existing failures due to
missing `@aws-sdk/client-ses` are unrelated)
- [ ] Bundle script produces both `index.mjs` and
`rds-global-bundle.pem` in `dist/lambda/`
- [ ] After deploy, verify staging API health check passes
- [ ] Verify admin login works on staging

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: correct API test suite parameters and bump version to 1.8.1

Fix publishing field names (targetDatabases, rootItemId, publishItemMode),
addLanguage field (languageCode), translation args (sourceLanguage, GUID),
and version comment inconsistency.

commit.message:
feat: web search endpoint — Perplexity-style search-augmented generation

New module vllm_i64/search/ with Brave Search API client (snippet-only,
stateless, no scraping). New endpoint POST /v1/search/completions:
query → Brave Search → numbered sources → model generates with [1][2] citations.

Streaming (SSE + final sources event) and non-streaming modes supported.
Stateless design: no search context persisted, zero cross-session leakage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

perf: optimize voice simulation STT/TTS pipeline

Speech Recognition optimizations (based on Web Speech API best practices):
- Add race condition guard (isRecognitionActive flag) to prevent
  "already started" errors on restart
- Add isProcessingTurn lock to prevent double-processing of utterances
- Safe start/stop helpers with proper state tracking
- Auto-restart on Chrome's ~3-4s silence timeout via onend handler
  with 100ms debounce delay to prevent rapid restart loops
- Skip very short results (<2 chars) as false positives
- Handle 'network' error gracefully (Chrome STT server issues)
- Enable autoGainControl for consistent mic volume normalization

TTS optimizations:
- Add 5s AbortController timeout on TTS API fetch to prevent
  hanging on slow ElevenLabs/OpenAI responses
- Faster fallback to browser speechSynthesis when API is slow

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix ShowingStatus enum in queries - use .value for String column

Dashboard and showing reminder service were passing ShowingStatus enum
objects instead of string values, crashing on the VARCHAR(20) column.

feat: 重构飞书卡片 — 决策视角布局 + 红绿灯评级 + 区域分组 + 业务标签

布局重构:
- 顶部副标题明确"上周合规动态回顾 | YYYY/MM/DD – YYYY/MM/DD"
- 引用块展示 LLM 生成的 300 字综述（复用 generate_executive_summary）
- 噪音过滤后统计数据（impact_score=0 的条目不计入总数展示）

视觉红绿灯:
- 🔴 score ≥ 9.0（高危）/ 🟠 7.0-8.9（重要）/ 🔵 <7.0（关注）
- 按来源权威性（official>legal>industry>news）→ impact_score 排序

地域优先级: 北美 > 欧洲 > 日韩台 > 亚太区 > 其他（严格顺序）

每条动态附加【全平台合规影响】业务标签:
- 📱 移动端：按 category_l1 映射具体关注点（IDFA/IAP/SDK等）
- 💻 PC 渠道：Anti-cheat/D2C/Launcher/跨端账号等

噪音门控:
- DB 查询过滤 impact_score=0
- 实时二次过滤（兜底旧 DB 评分残留）：_is_hardware_noise + _is_google_apple_non_core
- 区域内 bigram 去重（≥0.45 视为重复）+ 同分类限 1 条

按钮: 查看本周 HTML 交互简报 / 下载 PDF 专业内参

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
